max_hearts.title: Reach maximum Lifesteal heart count (Lifesteal mod — PvP heart economy, floor 3 hearts)

puffish_max.title: Invest in every Puffish Skills category — reach maximum skill investment across all trees

subtitle.text: Your body is not what it was at Ch01. It has been trained, broken, rebuilt, and trained again.

description: Each heart collected from PvP adds 1 max HP.
In Ch17, maximize your heart count — every extra heart is a buffer
The Revive Crystal from Ch15 is your safety net.
By Ch17 you have invested in three categories (Ch15 requirement).
Now invest in all remaining ones.
- Combat: maximum crit rate + base damage
- Utility: speed + reach for teleporter activation during combat
- Magic: maximum if using Iron's Spellbooks
You started this game as a survivor.
You are ending it as the strongest entity in the world.
The difference is seventeen chapters of consistent investment.
→ Invest in all Puffish Skills categories [check]
